---
name: content-writing
description: Expert in writing compelling web content and portfolio copy. Use this skill when creating About sections, project descriptions, or marketing copy. Writes clear, engaging content that converts visitors into clients or collaborators.
license: MIT
---

This skill guides the creation of effective web content that communicates value, builds trust, and drives action.

## Core Principles

**Value-First Writing**: Start with benefits, not features. Instead of "Built with React and TypeScript," write "Reduced load time by 60%, improving user engagement." Focus on outcomes and impact. Answer "So what?" for every claim. Lead with the transformation you provide.

**Project Case Studies**: Structure as Problem → Solution → Results. Describe the challenge specifically. Explain your approach and technology choices (but briefly). Highlight measurable outcomes (performance gains, user growth, cost savings). Include visuals and metrics. Make it scannable with headings and bullet points.

**About Section Strategy**: Tell your story but make it about them. Connect your background to client needs. Show personality while maintaining professionalism. Include a clear call-to-action. Avoid generic phrases ("passionate developer," "attention to detail"). Be specific and memorable.

**Call-to-Action Excellence**: Use action verbs and urgency. Be specific: "Schedule a free consultation" beats "Get in touch." Place CTAs strategically after value propositions. Make them visually prominent. Remove friction—link directly to calendar or contact form.

**Tone & Voice**: Write conversationally but professionally. Use active voice. Keep sentences short and scannable. Break up text with headings, lists, and white space. Avoid jargon unless targeting technical audience. Read aloud to catch awkward phrasing.

**SEO Integration**: Include keywords naturally in headings and first paragraphs. Write descriptive meta descriptions under 160 characters. Use semantic headings (H1 for page title, H2 for sections). Create compelling title tags with keywords.

Remember: Your website copy is your 24/7 salesperson. Make every word earn its place by adding value or building trust.
